Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltfs Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents Sets One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joanna M. Whitcher, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Walgreen Company
Donald E. Kretsa, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Barbara Ann Davis

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted, as modified. Defendant Walgreen Co.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, granted in part, denied in part:

Form interrogatory No. 4.1: withdrawn, moot
Special interrogatory no. 3: Granted; within ten days of service of this order, plaintiff shall serve a verified supplemental response
Special interrogatory no. 4: is off calendar, parties to meet and confer
Special interrogatory nos. 12, 13: denied without prejudice
Special interrogatory no. 14: Granted; within ten days of service of this order, plaintiff shall serve a verified supplemental response to that portion of the interrogatory that addresses issue of failure to guard against dangerous condition
Request for Production Nos. 11, 12: denied without prejudice. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Continued To May-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
